proof: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> T0, x2: (T1, T1) -> T1) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T0) { x0(x1(x3, x4)) = x2(x0(x3), x0(x4)) } = lib(relation_transport).preserves_binary_op[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[A, B](f, A.mul, B.mul)

function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> T0, x2: (T1, T1) -> T1, x3: T0, x4: T0) { not lib(relation_transport).preserves_binary_op[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or x0(x1(x3, x4)) = x2(x0(x3), x0(x4)) }[A, B](f, A.mul, B.mul, b + c, a)
(forall(x0: A, x1: A) { f(x0 * x1) = f(x0) * f(x1) } = true)

proof: not forall(x0: A, x1: A) { f(x0 * x1) = f(x0) * f(x1) } or not forall(x2: A, x3: A) { f(x2 + x3) = f(x2) + f(x3) }
(forall(x4: A, x5: A) { f(x4 * x5) = f(x4) * f(x5) } = true)
(forall(x6: A, x7: A) { f(x6 + x7) = f(x6) + f(x7) } = true)
not forall(x8: A, x9: A) { f(x8 + x9) = f(x8) + f(x9) }
